name: sudiptpa/khalti-sdk-php
description: Framework-agnostic Khalti PHP SDK for ePayment create/status verification and production-safe backend fulfillment.

scripts.lint: find src tests -type f -name '*.php' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 php -l
scripts.mutation: if [ -x vendor/bin/infection ]; then vendor/bin/infection --configuration=infection.json.dist; else echo 'Infection not installed. Install in your app/CI when needed.'; fi
